subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! The Divine Lote-Tree turneth from the precincts of the Most Great Prison and maketh mention of thee. I swear by the Sun of the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی سدره از شطر سجن اعظم توجه نموده و ترا ذکر مینماید قسم بافتاب افق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @knowledge; recognition of God, @role and station of women
